title: selliguea dareiformis
intro: Selliguea dareiformis, also known as the umbrella fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selliguea dareiformis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Selliguea dareiformis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional medicine practices, where it is valued for its unique combination of medicinal and adaptogenic properties.
